## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Scenario package
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test/CI

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual replay smoke test, if UI behavior changed

## Scenario/Data Checklist

Complete this section for scenario or data changes:

- [ ] Sources are listed and linkable where possible
- [ ] License/redistribution terms are documented
- [ ] Events include `happenedAt` and `publishedAt`
- [ ] Event summaries avoid hindsight wording
- [ ] Synthetic/sample data is marked with `meta.isSampleData`
- [ ] Restricted/generated/local-only data is not committed

## Risk Notes

Call out open risks, assumptions, or follow-up work.
